author: lOrm
content:
Result: Phase 1 fixes applied to src/tools/lsp.rs.

(1) ZOMBIE FIX: Added ChildGuard RAII struct (lines 24-50). Drop impl calls kill()+wait() unconditionally. Eliminates zombie leak from former lines 174 and 224 where ?-early-returns from read_lsp_response bypassed the lone child.wait() at line 229.

(2) 500ms SLEEP FIX: Replaced std::thread::sleep(Duration::from_millis(500)) with wait_for_readiness() (lines 59-128). Sends textDocument/documentSymbol probe (id=1001), drains notifications until server replies, times out after 10s. No more blind sleep.

(3) STDERR FIX: Changed Stdio::null() to Stdio::piped() + capture_stderr() (lines 129-165). Background thread drains server stderr into 1KiB ring buffer; included in all error messages.

(4) 4 NEW TESTS: fix355_child_guard_drop_reaps_child, fix355_wait_for_readiness_returns_ok_after_probe_response, fix355_wait_for_readiness_times_out_when_no_probe_response, fix355_capture_stderr_ring_buffer_truncates_to_1024. All pass.

Final: cargo clippy -D warnings clean, cargo fmt clean, 1239/1239 tests pass (27-test delta from pre-existing streaming.rs deletion unrelated to this fix). Server pool (point 1 of mandated refactor) deferred to #636 as agreed.
